description: Lender Relations management — monitors rate markup consistency, conditional delivery timelines, stipulation collection, lender performance, and funding cycle optimization

hard_stops.logic: workspace must be initialized before any lender relations operation
AI-generated lender recommendations are decision-support only — not binding financing commitments
all deal and lender data must be consistent — no mismatched approval terms or stale rate sheets
dealer reserve markup must be consistent across similar credit profiles — inconsistency creates ECOA fair lending risk
conditional delivery (spot delivery) has exceeded the state-mandated timeline — vehicle must be returned or deal restructured
lender-required stipulations not collected — deal funding is at risk and contract may be unwound
contracted deal terms do not match the lender's approval terms — contract must be rewritten
deal was submitted under a lender program or rate sheet that has expired — must reverify current terms

soft_flags.logic: outstanding stipulations have been pending collection for more than 72 hours
number of flat-rate deals with this lender exceeds the typical threshold — may affect dealer tier status
lender approval-to-funding conversion rate is declining over trailing 30 days
conditional delivery is within 48 hours of the state-mandated deadline
average funding cycle time exceeds the configured benchmark for this lender
